basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 21 Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on 17 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 21 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 38 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female, 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer)

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in basic science, Graduate / Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course, CSIR-UGC NET including Lectureship (Assistant Professorship), GATE, National Eligibility Examinations - DBT/DST/DAE/DOS/DRDO/MoE/ICAR/ICMR/IIT/IISc/IISER/NISER etc.
qualification.details: Essential: Post Graduate degree in basic science OR Graduate / Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course selected through CSIR-UGC NET including Lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE or National Eligibility Examinations conducted by Central Government Departments. Desirable Qualifications vary by project as detailed in Annexure-I.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- to Rs. 42,000/- per month + HRA

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and need of the project Test/ Interview
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 19-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment is 19-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 21 vacancies announced for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Rourkela.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in basic science or a Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in a Professional Course, selected through CSIR-UGC NET, GATE, or equivalent national eligibility examinations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is 38 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 37,000 to Rs. 42,000, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit and project requirements, followed by a test and/or interview.

faq.question: Q8. How should candidates apply for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates need to apply by sending their complete application via email to the address specified in the official notification before the deadline.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of NIT Rourkela?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Rourkela is located in Rourkela, Odisha, with the pincode 769008.
